docket_entries.description: VENUE CHALLENGE NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-03-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-07-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE COURT HAS RULED THAT VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. CONTINUED TO 8/7/06 AT 6:30 P.M. FOR TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEIL, MARY LUZ MANCHADO E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JENNINGS, CATHERINE IN REPRESENTATION OF THE BUSI- -NESS "LORENA ELLINGSON" EACH PARTY IS TO BEAR HIS/HER, ITS OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
